name: ChatGPT
description: Inspired by OpenAI's ChatGPT interface. Clean, professional design with a teal/green primary accent on neutral grays. Focuses on readability and a calm, trustworthy feel for conversational interfaces.
author: System

referenceTokens.--surface-hierarchy: light gray base, white cards in light; dark gray base in dark
referenceTokens.--intended-usage: Chat apps, AI interfaces, SaaS tools, documentation sites
referenceTokens.--text-approach: High readability, generous line height, mono for code, sans-serif for body
referenceTokens.--interaction-pattern: Subtle hover states, smooth transitions, non-intrusive
